name: SomeIpProvidedEventAddConsumer
title: SomeIpProvidedEventAddConsumer
syntax: long SomeIpProvidedEventAddConsumer(dword pevHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort);
description: Adds a consumer to a provided event. Afterwards the event notifications will be sent to this consumer.

parameters.name: pevHandle
parameters.description: Provided event handle (may be retrieved by SomeIpGetProvidedObjectHandle)
